name: compendium
description: Gallery-grade skills panel for Claude Code. Browse, search, favorite, and manage skills with warm gold-on-obsidian design. Auto-categorizes new skills. Includes Spotlight search, vault backup, and standalone vertical launcher.
author: Compendium

skills.name: compendium
skills.description: Launch the Compendium skills panel at http://127.0.0.1:8765 — browse, search, favorite, and manage all Claude Code skills. Use when you want to discover skills, see what's available, organize your skill library, or find the right skill for a task.
